title: 2025-11-24 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.48
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-11-24: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.48/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-11-24, the score printed 6.48/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
